subject: FW: To JE - World Science Festival, Music & the Brain event 5/31
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Monday, May 26, 2008 8:28 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: To JE - World Science Festival, Music & the Brain event 5/31



Dear Jeffrey,

Greetings! -

Great talking with you a couple of weeks ago...

Following up on our previous correspondence about the World Science
Festival in Manhattan this week -

I'd be honored if you would be my guest for my Music & the Brain gig at
the Abyssian Baptist Church with their world-famous choir and Oliver
Sacks - this Saturday, 5/31, 6:30 - 8:00P...

there will be about 7 different "acts" - I will probably go on between
7P and 7:15P...looks like I'll get to play their Hammond and my Les Paul
to make some points about universal competence in a way the lay audience
can (maybe) understand..If you think you might come, please let me know,
and I'll leave how ever many comp tickets you'd like at the box
office...the producer says it will likely be sold out, but then again,
she's the producer....

Here's a couple of links:

http://www.worldsciencefestival.com/2008-festival/events/all-events/musi
c-and-the-brain

http://www.worldsciencefestival.com/

Fri night, I'll probably go to see Institute Board colleague Bernie
Krause with Richard Leakey at Columbia (Miller Theatre) on Friday night
8-9:30P - their show is called "The Sixth Extinction" - want to come
along?

Peace & Love,
Mark
mtramo@hms.harvard.edu






-----Original Message-----
From:   Lesley Groff [mailto:lesley@nysgllc.com]
Sent:   Tue 4/15/2008 9:43 AM
To:     Tramo, Mark Jude
Cc:    
Subject:        RE: Readings, etc

Hello Mark!  Jeffrey said if he is in town he most definitely would love
to attend.  I am going to put it in his calendar now!  You might even
'remind' us of the event as the date approaches....and he did receive
the Galileo book!  Thank you.



From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu]
Sent: Monday, April 14, 2008 1:48 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Readings, etc



Hi Lesley!

Might Jeffrey be able to attend my June 1st gig at the Harlem Abyssian
Church - music and the brain lecture - integrated with their famous
choir's performance - as part of the first World Science Festival?

By the way, did the Galileo book ever reach him?

Cheers,
Mark
